description: AI and automation tools catalog for AWS-to-Azure Sitecore migration. Each tool includes estimated effort savings, applicability conditions, and recommendation status.

savings_cap.rationale: AI tool savings are capped at 50% per component to keep estimates credible. Real-world savings vary; this cap prevents over-promising.

mutual_exclusion_groups.reason: Choose one IaC approach per engagement — mixing creates maintenance burden
Primary CI/CD platform choice — pick one to standardize

discovery_assessment.name: Discovery & Assessment
discovery_assessment.description: Tools that accelerate infrastructure discovery and migration readiness assessment

data_migration.name: Data Migration
data_migration.description: Database migration and schema conversion tools

storage_migration.name: Storage Migration
storage_migration.description: Blob, file, and media library migration tools

code_assistance.name: Code Assistance
code_assistance.description: AI-powered code generation, refactoring, and migration assistance

infrastructure_automation.name: Infrastructure Automation
infrastructure_automation.description: Infrastructure as Code tools for repeatable Azure provisioning

testing_validation.name: Testing & Validation
testing_validation.description: Automated testing, performance validation, and load testing

monitoring_observability.name: Monitoring & Observability
monitoring_observability.description: AI-enhanced monitoring, anomaly detection, and insights

security_compliance.name: Security & Compliance
security_compliance.description: Automated security scanning, compliance checking, and policy enforcement

backup_dr.name: Backup & DR
backup_dr.description: Automated backup, disaster recovery, and business continuity

network_dns.name: Network & DNS
network_dns.description: Network migration, traffic management, and DNS cutover tools

alternatives.name: Azure Migrate
alternatives.description: Automated discovery and assessment of on-premises/AWS infrastructure. Generates Azure readiness reports, sizing recommendations, and cost estimates.
pros: Automated VM inventory and dependency mapping
cons: AWS discovery requires agent installation
Sitecore-specific topology not understood
May over-size VMs without Sitecore context

applicability_conditions.description: Most valuable when there are 2+ VMs to assess

alternatives.name: AWS Application Discovery Service
alternatives.description: Collects configuration, usage, and behavior data from AWS servers to support migration planning. Feeds into Azure Migrate for cross-cloud analysis.
cons: Requires agent on each EC2 instance
Data export needed for Azure tooling
No Sitecore-aware analysis
prerequisites: Permission to install agents on EC2 instances

applicability_conditions.description: Most valuable for larger deployments with 3+ instances

alternatives.name: Azure Database Migration Service
alternatives.description: Managed service for migrating SQL Server databases to Azure SQL. Supports online (minimal downtime) and offline migration modes.
cons: Requires VPN/ExpressRoute for AWS source
Some SQL features may need manual adjustment
Sitecore DB-specific indexes may need rebuild
prerequisites: Network connectivity between AWS RDS and Azure

applicability_conditions.description: Recommended for all SQL Server database migrations

alternatives.name: SQL Server Migration Assistant (SSMA)
alternatives.description: Automates database schema conversion and data migration from various database engines to SQL Server/Azure SQL.
cons: Desktop tool — not cloud-native
May flag false positives on Sitecore schemas
Limited to schema analysis — not data transfer
prerequisites: Connectivity to source and target databases

applicability_conditions.description: Most useful when migrating from non-SQL Server sources or older SQL versions

alternatives.name: Database Migration Assistant (DMA)
alternatives.description: Assesses SQL Server databases for compatibility issues, feature parity gaps, and performance recommendations for Azure SQL targets.
cons: Assessment only — no migration execution
Requires direct database connectivity
Reports can be verbose for large Sitecore DBs

applicability_conditions.description: Run before migration to identify blockers early

alternatives.name: AzCopy
alternatives.description: High-performance command-line tool for copying data to/from Azure Blob Storage. Supports S3-to-Blob direct transfer.

cost.details: Free tool — only pay for data transfer/storage

cons: CLI only — requires scripting for complex scenarios
S3 IAM credentials needed
No Sitecore media library metadata awareness

applicability_conditions.description: Recommended for all S3-to-Blob media library migrations

alternatives.name: Azure Storage Mover
alternatives.description: Managed migration service for large-scale file and object storage migrations to Azure. Provides monitoring and scheduling.

cost.details: Free service — only pay for data transfer/storage

cons: Requires agent VM in source environment
More setup overhead than AzCopy for small transfers
Newer service — fewer community resources
prerequisites: Agent VM deployed near source storage

applicability_conditions.description: Best for large media libraries (100GB+) where progress tracking and scheduling matter

alternatives.name: GitHub Copilot
alternatives.description: AI pair programmer that accelerates code changes, configuration updates, and integration refactoring during migration.
pros: Accelerates connection string and config updates
Helps refactor AWS SDK calls to Azure SDK
Generates boilerplate for Azure service integrations
cons: May suggest incorrect Azure API patterns
Sitecore-specific code suggestions can be inaccurate
Requires developer review of all suggestions
Not a substitute for migration expertise

applicability_conditions.description: Valuable when there are custom integrations or code changes needed

alternatives.name: Claude Code (AI Coding)
alternatives.description: AI coding assistant for complex migration tasks: refactoring AWS SDK dependencies, updating configuration files, generating IaC templates, and writing migration scripts.
pros: Generates migration scripts and runbook steps
cons: Requires clear migration context and constraints
Sitecore-specific patterns need verification
Not a substitute for infrastructure expertise

applicability_conditions.description: Valuable for any engagement with significant code or configuration changes

alternatives.name: Terraform / OpenTofu
alternatives.description: Infrastructure as Code for provisioning Azure resources. Codifies the entire target state for repeatable, auditable deployments.

cost.details: Open source (OpenTofu) or free tier (Terraform). Terraform Cloud optional.

pros: Large Azure provider with community modules
Multi-cloud support (can reference AWS for reads)
cons: Learning curve if team is new to IaC
State file management complexity
Sitecore-specific modules don't exist — custom needed
Initial template creation takes time (but saves on subsequent environments)

applicability_conditions.description: ROI increases with multiple environments. Essential for 2+ environments.

alternatives.name: Azure Bicep
alternatives.description: Azure-native IaC language. Simpler syntax than ARM templates, first-class Azure support, no state file management.
pros: Native Azure integration — always supports latest features
cons: Azure-only — no multi-cloud
Smaller community than Terraform
Team may already know Terraform
Less mature module ecosystem

applicability_conditions.description: Preferred when team is Azure-native and not already using Terraform

alternatives.name: Playwright AI Test Gen
alternatives.description: AI-assisted test generation for Sitecore front-end validation. Records user interactions and generates automated test scripts.
cons: Requires manual test scenario identification
Dynamic Sitecore content may cause false failures
Test maintenance overhead post-migration
prerequisites: Access to both source and target sites

applicability_conditions.description: Valuable for validating front-end rendering consistency post-migration

alternatives.name: K6 Performance Testing
alternatives.description: Load testing tool for validating Azure target performance matches or exceeds AWS baseline. Scriptable with JavaScript.

cost.details: Open source. Grafana Cloud K6 available for distributed testing.

cons: Requires baseline metrics from AWS environment
Script creation takes effort
May need cloud execution for realistic load

applicability_conditions.description: Recommended for all migrations to validate performance parity

alternatives.name: Azure Load Testing
alternatives.description: Managed load testing service in Azure. Supports JMeter scripts and URL-based tests with integrated monitoring.
pros: Managed — no load generator infrastructure needed
Integrates with Azure Monitor for server-side metrics
cons: Cost can grow with large load tests
Azure-only — can't test AWS baseline directly
Less flexible than K6 for custom scenarios

applicability_conditions.description: Good complement to K6 for Azure-integrated monitoring during load tests

alternatives.name: Azure Monitor AI Insights
alternatives.description: AI-powered anomaly detection, smart diagnostics, and proactive alerts for Azure resources. Accelerates post-migration monitoring setup.

cost.details: Included with Azure Monitor (pay for data ingestion)

cons: Learning period for anomaly detection
Custom Sitecore metrics need manual instrumentation
Data ingestion costs can add up

applicability_conditions.description: Recommended for all migrations — accelerates monitoring setup and post-migration stability

alternatives.name: Application Insights Smart Detection
alternatives.description: Automatic detection of performance anomalies, failure patterns, and degradation in Sitecore application telemetry.
cons: Needs 24-48 hours of data to establish baseline
Can be noisy during migration transition
Limited customization of detection rules

applicability_conditions.description: Enable immediately post-migration for automatic regression detection

alternatives.name: Microsoft Defender for Cloud
alternatives.description: Cloud security posture management with continuous assessment, compliance scoring, and threat protection for Azure resources.

cost.details: Free tier available. Enhanced plans per resource type.

pros: Automated security assessment of Azure resources
Compliance scoring against standards (CIS, PCI, SOC2)
Vulnerability scanning for VMs and databases
cons: Enhanced plans add cost
Alert volume can be high initially
Sitecore-specific security patterns not built-in

applicability_conditions.description: Recommended for all migrations. Essential when compliance requirements exist.

alternatives.name: Azure Policy Compliance
alternatives.description: Automated policy enforcement and compliance auditing. Ensures Azure resources meet organizational and regulatory standards.
pros: Built-in policy definitions for common standards
cons: Policy authoring requires Azure expertise
Overly strict policies can block deployments
No Sitecore-specific policy templates

applicability_conditions.description: Essential when compliance requirements (PCI, SOC2, HIPAA) are present

alternatives.name: Azure DevOps Pipeline Templates
alternatives.description: Pre-built pipeline templates for Azure deployments. Accelerates CI/CD rebuild with Sitecore-compatible build and deploy stages.

cost.details: Free tier: 1 parallel job, 1800 min/month. Paid plans for more.

cons: Migration from non-Azure DevOps CI requires full rebuild
Sitecore-specific templates need customization
YAML learning curve for complex pipelines

applicability_conditions.description: Preferred when team is already using Azure DevOps or plans to adopt it

alternatives.name: GitHub Actions with Copilot
alternatives.description: GitHub Actions CI/CD with Copilot-assisted workflow authoring. AI helps generate deployment workflows for Azure targets.

cost.details: Free tier: 2000 min/month. Copilot subscription separate.

pros: Copilot generates workflow YAML from descriptions
Large marketplace of Azure deployment actions
cons: Requires GitHub repository (or migration to GitHub)
Copilot suggestions need verification
Complex multi-stage deployments can be verbose

applicability_conditions.description: Preferred when team uses GitHub for source control

alternatives.name: Azure Site Recovery
alternatives.description: Disaster recovery as a service. Replicates VMs from AWS to Azure for DR or as a migration pathway with minimal downtime.
cons: Requires agent installation on source VMs
Network bandwidth for continuous replication
Sitecore role dependencies need manual sequencing
Post-failover config changes still needed

applicability_conditions.description: Most valuable for larger deployments where minimal downtime cutover is critical

alternatives.name: Azure Backup with Smart Tiering
alternatives.description: Intelligent backup with automatic tiering to optimize costs. Policy-based backup management for VMs, databases, and file shares.

cost.details: Based on protected instance size and storage consumed

cons: Backup policies need tuning for Sitecore RPO requirements
Cross-region backup adds cost
Restore testing should be validated

applicability_conditions.description: Standard for all Azure deployments — configure during validation phase

alternatives.name: Azure Traffic Manager (Gradual Cutover)
alternatives.description: DNS-based traffic routing for gradual migration cutover. Enables weighted routing to shift traffic from AWS to Azure incrementally.
pros: Gradual traffic shift reduces cutover risk
cons: DNS TTL affects failover speed
Session affinity between AWS and Azure needs careful handling
Sitecore session state must work cross-platform during transition
Adds DNS hop latency
prerequisites: Health endpoints on both AWS and Azure

applicability_conditions.description: Recommended when zero-downtime cutover is required or risk tolerance is low

alternatives.name: Azure Network Watcher
alternatives.description: Network monitoring and diagnostics tool. Validates connectivity, captures packets, and diagnoses networking issues during migration.

cost.details: Included with Azure subscription (packet capture has storage cost)

pros: Connection troubleshooting between Azure and AWS
IP flow verify for firewall rule validation
cons: Azure-side only — can't diagnose AWS networking
Flow logs generate significant storage
Learning curve for advanced features
prerequisites: Network Watcher enabled in target regions

applicability_conditions.description: Enable in all target regions for troubleshooting during migration

alternatives.name: Azure Advisor
alternatives.description: Personalized cloud consultant that provides recommendations for cost optimization, performance, reliability, security, and operational excellence.
pros: Security and reliability best practice checks
cons: Needs running resources to analyze — post-deployment only
Generic recommendations — not Sitecore-aware
Some recommendations require workload running period

applicability_conditions.description: Review after initial Azure deployment to optimize sizing and costs
